image_prompts.prompt: Hook visual: Did you know how the way you produce information changes your memory?
Context visual: It's called the production effect, and it's more powerful than you think.
Escalation visual: When you read, write, or say information aloud, your brain locks it in better.
Evidence visual: Research shows that producing information enhances recall, especially in learning environments.
Payoff visual: So next time you study, try saying it out loud. It could make all the difference.
Cta visual: Want to learn more about memory tricks? Follow for tips!
